fixtures: T1 prefix does not collide with T17
temporary shell scripts with resolver and bare tool calls
chore/DP-NNN-<slug> + active container + IMPLEMENTED pr-release task
chore/DP-NNN-<slug> + archived container + IMPLEMENTED pr-release task
chore/DP-NNN-<slug> + container but no IMPLEMENTED task (BLOCKED)
PWD inside worktree -> head_sha = worktree HEAD
PWD inside main checkout -> head_sha = main HEAD
non-git fixture -> exit 1 with clear error
PWD not in git -> fallback to ancestor walk
clean workspace exits 0; planted ACME-9999 leak exits non-zero with BLOCKED marker

fresh manifest exits 0; stale source / missing manifest target exits non-zero with compile-runtime-instructions.sh repair hint; POLARIS_*_BYPASS env does not silence; portable git hook + Claude pre-push adapter both wire the gate before the main/develop branch early-exit
18 graduated memory anchors present in target framework files
pre-write-language-policy POLARIS_PRODUCER set -> NO friction (producer carve-out)
auto-pass-probe PASS -> NO friction (only UNKNOWN triggers)
auto-pass-increment-counter 2->3 -> counter updated, NO additional friction
AUTO_PASS_LEDGER_PATH unset -> all triggers NOOP silently
AUTO_PASS_LEDGER_PATH set but ledger missing -> all triggers NOOP silently
helper validates ledger is JSON object (corrupt ledger -> exit 1)
runtime targets contain source-level completion invariant
auto-pass rejects task-local closeout as source completion
framework-release closeout remains terminal tail evidence only
